transcript: [no speech, typing sounds and notification pings]
on_screen_text:
Riya ek baat bolu [Riya, can I tell you something?]
English samjh toh aati hai, lekin bolni nahi aati hai 😔 [I understand English, but I don't know how to speak it]
Iss wajah se personal life mein ladkiyan bhav nahi deti [Because of this, girls don't pay attention to me in my personal life]
Aur office mein boss bhi promotion nahi deta [And in the office, the boss doesn't give me a promotion either]
Har taraf se band baji padi hai [I'm stuck from all sides]
Sochta hoon...bachpan mein english nahi Sikhi toh ab toh koi chance hi nahi hai [I think... if I didn't learn English in childhood, now there's no chance at all]
Riya: Arey amit, aisa bilkul bhi nahi hai [Oh Amit, it's not like that at all]
Riya: Tu abhi bhi english fluently bol sakta hai [You can still speak English fluently]
Riya: Aur woh bhi simple treeke se...sirf roz mujhse thodi der chat karke... [And that too in a simple way... just by chatting with me for a little while every day...]
Riya: Main Teri dost bhi hu aur coach bhi 👑 [I am your friend and also your coach]
Riya: Aur yahaan koi judgement nahi...galti karega toh sirf sahi karvaungi [And no judgment here... if you make a mistake, I will only correct you]
Sach?? [Really??]
Matalab bachpan ke alawa ab iss umar mein bhi ab mein english sikh sakta hoon [Meaning, apart from childhood, even at this age I can learn English now?]
Woh bhi confidence ke sath bol sakta hoon?? [And can speak with confidence too??]
Riya: Bilkul! 🤝 [Absolutely!]
Riya: Tu sirf english nahi seekhega, Amit... [You won't just learn English, Amit...]
Riya: Tu izzat aur confidence kamayega jo paisa bhi nahi dila sakta ✨😎 [You will earn respect and confidence that even money can't buy]
Riya: Aur sirf 15 din mein Teri personality aisa chamkegi ki log samne se salaam karenge 🫡 [And in just 15 days, your personality will shine so much that people will salute you upfront]
Woww 😍 [Woww]
Riya you are the best ❤️ [Riya you are the best]
Tumne toh meri problem hi solve kardi [You have solved my problem]
Chalo time waste nahi karte hai [Come on, let's not waste time]
Aaj se hi english Sikhna shuru karte hai [Let's start learning English from today itself]
Great! Download My Sivi. I'll see you there
summary: The ad features a simulated WhatsApp conversation where a user expresses frustration over understanding English but being unable to speak it fluently, which affects his career and personal life. His contact, Riya, introduces him to 'My Sivi' as a friendly, judgment-free AI coach to practice daily. The ad ends with a call-to-action to download the My Sivi app.
